title: pelargonium × fragrans
intro: Pelargonium × fragrans, also known as Rose Geranium, is a popular, fragrant, and flowering plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce stress, promote digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin irritations and infections. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its numerous health benefits.
